# Third-Party Submodules

This directory is reserved for `jethac` forks of upstream libraries that this campaign needs to patch.

Do not add upstream repositories directly if we plan to carry changes. Fork under `jethac` first, then add the fork as a submodule.

See [../docs/FORKS_AND_WORKTREES.md](../docs/FORKS_AND_WORKTREES.md).
